events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: residential rebar placement, rough-complete, missing chairs/supports, mat on dirt. Defect: rebar mat resting on dirt without proper support/chairs. Non-compliant with ACI 318/117 and placing drawings likely requiring support to maintain concrete cover and position. Decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? It says if dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Missing chairs is non-compliant. Risk: high? Rebar on dirt leads to inadequate cover, corrosion, reduced structural capacity. Residential maybe medium/high. Let's choose high. Work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete 70 as prompt says treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. value 0. confidence 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, sound_source "", order [], workable []. findings: "Rebar mat lacks chairs/supports and is resting directly on soil", "Concrete cover and bar position will not be maintained during pour", "Non-compliant with ACI 318/117 and placing drawings". actions: "Install approved rebar chairs/supports at required spacing before concrete placement", "Verify cover and elevation per placing drawings", "Re-inspect before pour". rationale: "Rebar must be supported to maintain design cover and alignment; a mat on dirt cannot maintain these, creating a structural defect." references: ["ACI 318", "ACI 117", "placing drawings"]. Ensure valid JSON only, no prose.

  "rationale": "Rebar must be supported to maintain design cover, position, and structural performance. A mat lying directly on soil is non-compliant and will result in inadequate concrete cover and potential corrosion or capacity loss.",

    "placing drawings"
